creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Tassou from comment #0)

> I don't have any custom options.

Maybe think about how your poudriere.conf differs from defaults. 

diff /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf.sample /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf | grep TMPFS | grep -v \#

... and so on.
